prompt: Messy whiteboard/drawingboard visualization on dark background (#0a0e14). Hand-drawn sketchy marker style showing skill distribution architecture. The dashed lines are labeled 'symlinks' in small handwritten text. A curved dashed arrow goes back upward from the plugins box to the GitHub box, labeled 'git fetch (periodic)' in blue-green. Whiteboard marker aesthetic with imperfect lines, like someone explaining architecture on a blackboard. Dark background #0a0e14.
